title: cephaelis involucrans
intro: Cephaelis involucrans, also known as the Wild Coffee or Ilex guayusa, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its stimulating and medicinal properties, particularly for its high caffeine content. The leaves of Cephaelis involucrans have been reported to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
